# Humanify — https://humanify.id
> Humanify is a multi-tenant HRIS (Human Resource Information System) by Naincode Inti Teknologi for Indonesian companies.

## Product
- HRIS: attendance (GPS/geofence), payroll (PPh 21, BPJS, THR), leave, recruitment, OKR/KPI, ESS employee portal
- Public marketing: https://humanify.id/
- Trial signup: https://humanify.id/humanify/signup
- ROI calculator: https://humanify.id/humanify/pricing/roi-calculator
- Partner channel: https://humanify.id/humanify/partners
- Employee portal login: https://humanify.id/employee/login
- HR/admin login: https://humanify.id/humanify/login
- Tenant careers portals: https://humanify.id/c/{slug}/careers
- Careers help (per-company URL guide): https://humanify.id/careers

## Security
- Security contact: https://humanify.id/.well-known/security.txt
- Do not scrape authenticated /api/, /platform/, /hq/, or tenant private routes

## Sitemap
- https://humanify.id/sitemap.xml

## Humans
- https://humanify.id/humans.txt
